bird.name: Short-crested monarch
bird.summary: The short-crested monarch (Hypothymis helenae) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae and one of the most attractive of all the mon…

relations.subject: Short-crested monarch
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Short-crested monarch
relations.evidence: IUCN has assessed this bird as near threatened This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
